person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Ebles I of Roucy (died 11 May 1033) was count of Roucy from 1000 to 1033 and archbishop of Reims from 1021 to 1033. His father has traditionally been considered to have been Giselbert, Count of Roucy and Reims. A novel theory (described in French Wikipedia) by Jean-Noël Mathieu resolves some inconsistencies by instead placing Giselbert as his matrilineal great uncle, and Eble de Poitiers as his father.

He married Beatrix, the daughter of Reginar IV, Count of Mons and Hedwig of France (daughter of Hugh Capet).

«b»Descendants«/b»
1.) His daughter, Alice, married Hilduin IV of Montdidier, Count of Roucy.

a.) Alice's son was Ebles II of Roucy.

b.) Alice's daughter, Margaret de Roucy, married Hugh, Count of Clermont. Their daughter, Adeliza, married Gilbert Fitz Richard.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims於0988年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯時，他的父親Giselbert de Roucy40歲，母親Ermengarde d'Aquitaine38歲。他於1013年11月5日與Béatrice de Hainaut在法國皮卡迪艾斯盧希結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1015年在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯被列為archbishop。他去世於1033年5月11日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特芒內萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims于0988年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯时，他的父亲Giselbert de Roucy40岁，母亲Ermengarde d'Aquitaine38岁。他于1013年11月5日与Béatrice de Hainaut在法国皮卡迪艾斯盧希结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1015年在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯被列为archbishop。他去世于1033年5月11日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在法国德 艾斯特芒內萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): probably a variant of   Roach  .

variants.name: Rauch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Kurt, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Heinz, Horst, Wilfried, Angelika, Dieter, Elke.

nameMeanings.name: Ebles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Able , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Americanized form of German and Dutch   Abels  .

variants.name: Able
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the younger son of Adam and Eve, who was murdered for reasons of jealousy by his brother Cain (Genesis 4:1–8). The Hebrew form is Hevel, ostensibly representing the vocabulary word hevel ‘breath, vapour’, and so taken to imply vanity or worthlessness. Abel is considered by the Christian Church to have been a pre-Christian martyr (see Matthew 23:35), and is invoked as a saint in the litany for the dying. Nevertheless, his name has not been much used either before or after its brief vogue among the Puritans.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims was born in 0988, in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Giselbert de Roucy, was 40 and his mother, Ermengarde d'Aquitaine, was 38. He married Béatrice de Hainaut on 5 November 1013, in Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1015, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as archbishop in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. He died on 11 May 1033, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims est né en 0988, à Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Giselbert de Roucy, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde d'Aquitaine, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Béatrice de Hainaut le 5 novembre 1013, à Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1015, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est archbishop à Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1033, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims 0988 in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giselbert de Roucy 40 und seine Mutter Ermengarde d'Aquitaine 38. Er hat am 5. November 1013 in Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich Béatrice de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1015, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als archbishop in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Mai 1033 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Reims, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims è nato il nel 0988 nel Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Giselbert de Roucy, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde d'Aquitaine, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Béatrice de Hainaut il 5 novembre 1013, nel Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1015, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come archbishop nel Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Morì il 11 maggio 1033, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Reims, Marne, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reimsが0988年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズで生まれた時，父Giselbert de Roucyは40歳，母Ermengarde d'Aquitaineは38歳であった。1013年11月5日にフランスピカーディエイスンロウシでBéatrice de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1015年，27歳の時，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズでの職業はarchbishopと記録されている。彼は1033年5月11日に故郷で45歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストマルンレイムズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims(이)가 0988년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giselbert de Roucy(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde d'Aquitaine(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1013년 11월 5일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 루시에서 Béatrice de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1015년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스에서 archbishop이었다. 그는 1033년 5월 11일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 레임스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims nasceu em 0988, em Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Giselbert de Roucy, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde d'Aquitaine, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrice de Hainaut em 5 de novembro de 1013, em Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1015, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como archbishop em Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1033, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Reims, Marne, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims родился в 0988 г. в местности римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Giselbert de Roucy было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde d'Aquitaine, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice de Hainaut 5 ноября 1013 г. в местности роуси, эисн, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1015 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии archbishop в местности римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция. Он умер 11 мая 1033 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности римс, марн, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebles Ier de Roucy archevêque de Reims nació en 0988, en Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Giselbert de Roucy, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ermengarde d'Aquitaine, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Béatrice de Hainaut el 5 de noviembre de 1013, en Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1015, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era archbishop en Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1033, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Reims, Marne, Grand Est, Francia.
